nasb.text: But will he not say to him, ‘Prepare something for me to eat, and properly clothe yourself and serve me while I eat and drink; and afterward you may eat and drink’?

esv.text: Will he not rather say to him, ‘Prepare supper for me, and dress properly,  and serve me while I eat and drink, and afterward you will eat and drink’?

cnv.text: 而不對他說：‘給我預備晚餐，束起腰來服事我，等我吃喝完了，你才吃喝’呢？

ccb.text: 不都是吩咐他‘给我准备晚饭，束上腰带伺候我用餐，等我吃完，你才可以吃’吗？

csbs.text: 他难道不会对奴仆说‘你预备我所要吃的晚餐，束上腰带伺候我，等我吃喝完了，你才要吃喝’吗？
